findings.description: The 'Contact' heading in the PDF is bold and smaller, while in the HTML it appears as a larger heading style
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Contact' in bold body-sized text; HTML renders it as a larger section heading

findings.description: The horizontal rule/separator line under the title is not present in the PDF but appears in the HTML version
findings.evidence: PDF has no horizontal line separating title from body text; HTML has a dark horizontal rule after the title

findings.description: The HTML contains nested <main> tags, which is a structural duplication of the wrapper element, though it does not result in duplicated visible content.
findings.evidence: HTML has <main> nested inside another <main> element.
